canvas.html:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>silk.exe</title>
<style>
* { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
body { 
  background: #0a0a0f; 
  overflow: hidden; 
  width: 100vw; 
  height: 100vh;
}
canvas { 
  display: block; 
  width: 100%; 
  height: 100%; 
}
</style>
</head>
<body>
<canvas id="canvas"></canvas>
<script>
const canvas = document.getElementById('canvas');
const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');

let width, height;
let mouse = { x: 0, y: 0, px: 0, py: 0, down: false };

// Cloth parameters
const COLS = 45;
const ROWS = 30;
const SPACING = 18;
const CONSTRAINT_ITERATIONS = 5;
const GRAVITY = 0.3;
const DAMPING = 0.98;
const TEAR_DISTANCE = 60;

let points = [];
let constraints = [];

class Point {
  constructor(x, y, pinned = false) {
    this.x = x;
    this.y = y;
    this.px = x;
    this.py = y;
    this.pinned = pinned;
    this.mass = 1;
  }

  update(wind) {
    if (this.pinned) return;
    
    let vx = (this.x - this.px) * DAMPING;
    let vy = (this.y - this.py) * DAMPING;
    
    this.px = this.x;
    this.py = this.y;
    
    this.x += vx;
    this.y += vy;
    this.y += GRAVITY;
    
    // Wind force
    this.x += wind.x * 0.3;
    this.y += wind.y * 0.1;
    
    // Mouse interaction
    if (mouse.down) {
      let dx = this.x - mouse.x;
      let dy = this.y - mouse.y;
      let dist = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
      if (dist < 80) {
        let force = (80 - dist) / 80;
        this.x += (mouse.x - mouse.px) * force * 0.5;
        this.y += (mouse.y - mouse.py) * force * 0.5;
      }
    }
  }

  constrain() {
    if (this.pinned) return;
    
    // Keep in bounds with some bounce
    if (this.x < 0) { this.x = 0; this.px = this.x + (this.x - this.px) * 0.5; }
    if (this.x > width) { this.x = width; this.px = this.x + (this.x - this.px) * 0.5; }
    if (this.y < 0) { this.y = 0; this.py = this.y + (this.y - this.py) * 0.5; }
    if (this.y > height) { this.y = height; this.py = this.y + (this.y - this.py) * 0.5; }
  }
}

class Constraint {
  constructor(p1, p2) {
    this.p1 = p1;
    this.p2 = p2;
    this.length = SPACING;
    this.active = true;
  }

  resolve() {
    if (!this.active) return;
    
    let dx = this.p2.x - this.p1.x;
    let dy = this.p2.y - this.p1.y;
    let dist = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
    
    if (dist > TEAR_DISTANCE) {
      this.active = false;
      return;
    }
    
    let diff = (this.length - dist) / dist;
    let offsetX = dx * diff * 0.5;
    let offsetY = dy * diff * 0.5;
    
    if (!this.p1.pinned) {
      this.p1.x -= offsetX;
      this.p1.y -= offsetY;
    }
    if (!this.p2.pinned) {
      this.p2.x += offsetX;
      this.p2.y += offsetY;
    }
  }
}

function init() {
  width = canvas.width = window.innerWidth * window.devicePixelRatio;
  height = canvas.height = window.innerHeight * window.devicePixelRatio;
  canvas.style.width = window.innerWidth + 'px';
  canvas.style.height = window.innerHeight + 'px';
  
  points = [];
  constraints = [];
  
  const startX = (width - (COLS - 1) * SPACING) / 2;
  const startY = height * 0.15;
  
  // Create points
  for (let y = 0; y < ROWS; y++) {
    for (let x = 0; x < COLS; x++) {
      let pinned = y === 0 && (x % 4 === 0);
      points.push(new Point(startX + x * SPACING, startY + y * SPACING, pinned));
    }
  }
  
  // Create constraints
  for (let y = 0; y < ROWS; y++) {
    for (let x = 0; x < COLS; x++) {
      let i = y * COLS + x;
      if (x < COLS - 1) {
        constraints.push(new Constraint(points[i], points[i + 1]));
      }
      if (y < ROWS - 1) {
        constraints.push(new Constraint(points[i], points[i + COLS]));
      }
    }
  }
}

function getWind(time) {
  let baseWind = Math.sin(time * 0.0005) * 2;
  let gust = Math.sin(time * 0.002) * Math.sin(time * 0.0007) * 3;
  let turbulence = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 0.5;
  
  return {
    x: baseWind + gust + turbulence,
    y: Math.sin(time * 0.001) * 0.3
  };
}

function update(time) {
  const wind = getWind(time);
  
  // Update points
  for (let p of points) {
    p.update(wind);
  }
  
  // Resolve constraints multiple times for stability
  for (let i = 0; i < CONSTRAINT_ITERATIONS; i++) {
    for (let c of constraints) {
      c.resolve();
    }
    for (let p of points) {
      p.constrain();
    }
  }
}

function draw(time) {
  ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(10, 10, 15, 0.15)';
  ctx.fillRect(0, 0, width, height);
  
  // Draw mesh
  ctx.lineWidth = 1.5;
  
  for (let c of constraints) {
    if (!c.active) continue;
    
    // Calculate strain for color
    let dx = c.p2.x - c.p1.x;
    let dy = c.p2.y - c.p1.y;
    let dist = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
    let strain = Math.min((dist - SPACING) / (TEAR_DISTANCE - SPACING), 1);
    
    // Velocity for brightness
    let vel1 = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(c.p1.x - c.p1.px, 2) + Math.pow(c.p1.y - c.p1.py, 2));
    let vel2 = Math.sqrt(Math.pow(c.p2.x - c.p2.px, 2) + Math.pow(c.p2.y - c.p2.py, 2));
    let avgVel = (vel1 + vel2) / 2;
    let brightness = 0.3 + Math.min(avgVel * 0.1, 0.7);
    
    // Gradient from cyan to pink based on y position and strain
    let yRatio = (c.p1.y + c.p2.y) / 2 / height;
    let hue = 180 + yRatio * 140 + strain * 60; // cyan → pink → stressed
    
    ctx.strokeStyle = `hsla(${hue}, 80%, ${50 + brightness * 30}%, ${0.4 + brightness * 0.4})`;
    
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.moveTo(c.p1.x, c.p1.y);
    ctx.lineTo(c.p2.x, c.p2.y);
    ctx.stroke();
  }
  
  // Draw points with glow on pinned ones
  for (let p of points) {
    if (p.pinned) {
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.arc(p.x, p.y, 6, 0, Math.PI * 2);
      ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0, 255, 255, 0.8)';
      ctx.shadowColor = '#00ffff';
      ctx.shadowBlur = 15;
      ctx.fill();
      ctx.shadowBlur = 0;
    }
  }
  
  // Subtle ambient glow on the fabric
  let gradient = ctx.createRadialGradient(
    width / 2, height * 0.4, 0,
    width / 2, height * 0.4, height * 0.5
  );
  gradient.addColorStop(0, 'rgba(255, 0, 128, 0.02)');
  gradient.addColorStop(1, 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0)');
  ctx.fillStyle = gradient;
  ctx.fillRect(0, 0, width, height);
}

function animate(time) {
  update(time);
  draw(time);
  requestAnimationFrame(animate);
}

// Event listeners
window.addEventListener('resize', init);

canvas.addEventListener('mousemove', e => {
  mouse.px = mouse.x;
  mouse.py = mouse.y;
  mouse.x = e.clientX * window.devicePixelRatio;
  mouse.y = e.clientY * window.devicePixelRatio;
});

canvas.addEventListener('mousedown', () => mouse.down = true);
canvas.addEventListener('mouseup', () => mouse.down = false);
canvas.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => mouse.down = false);

canvas.addEventListener('touchmove', e => {
  e.preventDefault();
  mouse.px = mouse.x;
  mouse.py = mouse.y;
  mouse.x = e.touches[0].clientX * window.devicePixelRatio;
  mouse.y = e.touches[0].clientY * window.devicePixelRatio;
}, { passive: false });

canvas.addEventListener('touchstart', e => {
  mouse.down = true;
  mouse.x = e.touches[0].clientX * window.devicePixelRatio;
  mouse.y = e.touches[0].clientY * window.devicePixelRatio;
  mouse.px = mouse.x;
  mouse.py = mouse.y;
});

canvas.addEventListener('touchend', () => mouse.down = false);

init();
requestAnimationFrame(animate);
</script>
</body>
</html>
